  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (match &hald5000 
      (Doxorubicin $p $o) 
      (Doxorubicin $p $o)) 
    ( (Doxorubicin elevated Trastuzumab) 
      (Doxorubicin associated MIR375) 
      (Doxorubicin stratify Liposarcoma)))

[

;
;; METTA-WAM-ISSUE-116.TEST-SPO-5000.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.002 secs. (2.06 milliseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (match &hald5000 
      (Doxorubicin $p $o) 
      (Doxorubicin $p $o)) 
    ( (Doxorubicin elevated Trastuzumab) 
      (Doxorubicin associated MIR375) 
      (Doxorubicin stratify Liposarcoma)))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      ( (Doxorubicin stratify Liposarcoma) 
        (Doxorubicin associated MIR375) 
        (Doxorubicin elevated Trastuzumab)) 
      ( (Doxorubicin elevated Trastuzumab) 
        (Doxorubicin associated MIR375) 
        (Doxorubicin stratify Liposarcoma))))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5904))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (match &hald5000 
            (Doxorubicin $_3716 $_3734) 
            (Doxorubicin $_3716 $_3734)) 
          ( (Doxorubicin elevated Trastuzumab) 
            (Doxorubicin associated MIR375) 
            (Doxorubicin stratify Liposarcoma))) $_3412) 
      (,

        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3412 $_4012) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3106) $_4012)))))
